description: OpenSearch is an open source search and analytics suite used for indexing, querying, and analyzing data. It can be deployed by users in their own environments and includes search, observability, and related data features.
summary: OpenSearch exposes a self-hosted REST API with an official published OpenAPI spec, plus documented CLIs including `opensearch-cli` and the SQL/PPL CLI; authentication is deployment-dependent, with HTTP basic auth documented as one supported method.
